description_long: This is a hardcover book with a light blue cover, featuring a colorful illustration of four children dressed in dark clothing, two of whom are holding bags and one holding flowers. The cover is bordered at the top and bottom with a row of small white flower motifs. The back cover is plain blue with a small barcode in the lower left corner. The spine is also blue and does not display any visible text or decoration. The book appears to be of medium thickness, with white pages visible from the side views. The overall design is simple yet vibrant, with the front illustration being the main decorative element.
description: A light blue hardcover book with a colorful illustration of four children on the front and a plain blue back cover with a barcode.
description_view_0: The front cover shows a light blue background with a prominent illustration of four children and a border of small white flowers.
description_view_1: The spine view reveals a blue spine with no visible text or decoration, and the white pages are clearly visible.
description_view_2: The back cover is plain blue with a small barcode in the lower left corner and no other decoration.
description_view_3: The opposite spine view is similar to view 1, showing the blue spine and the white pages, with no visible text or design.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a stylized illustration of four children, three boys and one girl, all dressed in dark clothing. One child is holding a bouquet of flowers, and two are carrying bags. The illustration is colorful and has a vintage, hand-drawn style.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is light blue with no visible text, patterns, or decorative elements. It appears plain and unadorned.
